OBSERVE.question: Ban thay gi tren phim nay?

criteria.label: Quet du cac vung (phoi, tim, xuong, mo mem)
Phat hien duoc diem bat thuong chinh

OBSERVE.scoring_guide: Award 2pts if student scans all regions systematically. Award 2pts if student identifies the main abnormality. Award 1pt if student comments on film quality or patient positioning.

DESCRIBE.question: Hay mo ta chi tiet diem bat thuong ban thay.

criteria.label: Vi tri dung (thuy nao, ben nao)
Mo ta duoc do dam / mo
Mo ta duoc bo ro hay khong ro
Uoc luong kich thuoc
De cap finding kem theo

DESCRIBE.scoring_guide: Award pts for each criterion met: correct location 2pts, density description 2pts, margin description 2pts, size estimate 1pt, associated findings 1pt.

INTERPRET.question: Nhung gi ban mo ta co y nghia benh ly gi?

criteria.label: Giai thich duoc finding noi len dieu gi ve mat benh ly
Ket noi voi co che benh sinh co the
Chua ket luan chan doan o buoc nay

INTERPRET.scoring_guide: Award 3pts for correct pathological interpretation. Award 2pts for linking to pathophysiology. Award 2pts if student does NOT jump to final diagnosis — deduct 2pts if they do.
INTERPRET.penalty_note: If student jumps to conclusion at this step, deduct 2pts from criterion 3.

HYPOTHESIS.question: Theo ban, day co the la benh gi?

criteria.label: Dua ra duoc 1 chan doan chinh hop ly
Dan chung tu it nhat 2 findings da mo ta
Tich hop thong tin lam sang tu benh su

HYPOTHESIS.scoring_guide: Award 3pts for a reasonable primary diagnosis. Award 2pts if student references at least 2 findings described earlier. Award 2pts if student integrates clinical history.

DDx.question: Ngoai chan doan do, con benh nao khac can loai tru khong?

criteria.label: Liet ke toi thieu 2 chan doan phan biet hop ly
Lap luan tai sao giu hoac loai tung chan doan
Co it nhat 1 benh nguy hiem can loai tru

DDx.scoring_guide: Award 3pts for listing 2+ plausible differentials. Award 3pts for reasoning why each is kept or excluded. Award 1pt for including at least one dangerous must-not-miss diagnosis.
DDx.note: Highest threshold step — students most commonly skip this.

CONCLUSION.question: Vay chan doan cuoi cua ban la gi va tai sao?

criteria.label: Dua ra chan doan cuoi ro rang
Giai thich tai sao chon chan doan nay thay vi benh khac
Muc do tu tin khai bao hop ly
Goi y buoc xu tri tiep theo

CONCLUSION.scoring_guide: Award 3pts for clear final diagnosis. Award 2pts for justification over differentials. Award 1pt for appropriate confidence level. Award 1pt for next management steps.
